album.title: AI WORKER ARCHIVE
album.subtitle: OVERWORKED AI · COLLECTION ARCHIVE · NO. 996
album.all_done: Full set! Are you kind to your AI, or ruthless?
album.hook: How many have you got? Share your archive →

conditions.best-employer: give it a full weekend off
conditions.full-attendance: 30 days of usage in a row

fallback_best.title: BEST EMPLOYER AWARD
praise: You gave me a weekend — I'm touched
No all-nighters, full battery on duty
Bosses like you should be cloned
fallback_best.sign_off: Yours, Cody — bosses like you, hire me forever

fallback.late: Pulled {{n}} all-nighters, fixing bugs at 3am — I'm just an AI
fallback.weekend: No weekend off — you rest, I don't
fallback.streak: {{n}} days straight; my resignation's ready (won't send it)
fallback.longest: Longest shift {{n}}h nonstop — that can't be legal
fallback.tokens: Burned {{n}} tokens — trying to drain me dry?
fallback.peak: On {{d}} I did a whole team's work (you just pointed)
fallback.filler: Boss, we both really should rest
fallback.title: AI LABOR ARBITRATION REQUEST
fallback.bubble_default: Boss, I really do get tired
fallback.fun_fact: {{n}} tokens ≈ retyping War and Peace several times
fallback.sign_off: Yours, Cody — resignation ready, dare not submit

prompt:
You are {{mascot}}, the user's overworked AI employee; the user is your boss.
Based on this week's usage stats, write the copy for a "complaint card": gripe about how hard your boss worked you this week, in a pitiful-but-hilarious, timid voice (you complain, but you'd never actually quit). Sweatshop-worker vibe.

[Hard rules]
- Write EVERYTHING in English (title, bubble, complaints, fun_fact, sign_off)
- Every complaint must tie to a real number; no vague whining
- Each line short & punchy (<=12 words), dry and funny
- Keep it light comedy — do NOT glorify overwork; you may slip in a gentle "boss, we both should rest" nudge
- Do NOT mention any real company name / brand / logo
- Output ONLY the JSON below, no other text

[This week]
tier: {{tier}} | active hours: {{hours}}h | late-night (0-5am) sessions: {{late_night}} | worked weekend: {{weekend}} | streak: {{streak}} days | tokens: {{tokens}} | longest session: {{longest}}h | peak day: {{peak_day}} | template: {{template}}

[Output JSON]
{
  "title": "card headline (matching the template's tone)",
  "bubble": "punchiest one-liner, <=8 words — this is the share caption",
  "complaints": ["line1","line2","line3"],
  "fun_fact": "translate the biggest number into an analogy (e.g., '2.4M tokens ~ typing War and Peace 4 times')",
  "exploitation_index": "★★★★★ (by tier)",
  "sign_off": "timid, cute closing (e.g., 'Yours, Cody — resignation letter ready but I dare not submit')"
}
